hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”；【WORLD】中东紧张局势再次加剧，特朗普警告伊朗“时间紧迫”；【CRYPTO】现货比特币 ETF 净流出 6.49 亿美元，创 1 月份以来最大净流出。

items.title: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
items.summary: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”
items.summary_zh: 随着通胀飙升和国债收益率飙升，沃什可能会面对没有心情放松政策的联邦公开市场委员会。

items.title: Trump Warns Iran the ‘Clock Is Ticking’ as Tensions Surge Again in Middle East
items.summary: The president has sought to force Iran to accept his terms on its nuclear program or else face renewed war. An emboldened Iran has rebuffed Trump’s demands.
items.title_zh: 中东紧张局势再次加剧，特朗普警告伊朗“时间紧迫”
items.summary_zh: 总统试图迫使伊朗接受他的核计划条款，否则将面临新的战争。胆大妄为的伊朗拒绝了特朗普的要求。

items.title: Spot bitcoin ETFs log $649 million in net outflows, largest since January
items.summary: Bitcoin is trading below $77,000 due to geopolitical tensions, inflation fears, and higher U.S. Treasury yields, analysts said.
items.title_zh: 现货比特币 ETF 净流出 6.49 亿美元，创 1 月份以来最大净流出
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，由于地缘政治紧张局势、通胀担忧以及美国国债收益率走高，比特币交易价格低于 77,000 美元。

items.title: Warren Buffett teased to CNBC a ‘tiny purchase’ in March. Berkshire filing may have revealed it
items.summary: When asked in March whether Berkshire was still putting money to work, Buffett said the conglomerate had made "one tiny purchase."
items.title_zh: 三月份，沃伦·巴菲特向 CNBC 开玩笑说这是一次“小额收购”。伯克希尔的文件可能已经透露了这一点
items.summary_zh: 三月份，当被问及伯克希尔是否仍在投入资金时，巴菲特表示，该集团已经进行了“一笔小额收购”。

items.title: Sea's View on the Future of Agentic Software Development with Codex
items.summary: Sea Limited's CPO explains why the company is deploying Codex across engineering teams to accelerate AI-native software development in Asia.
items.title_zh: Sea 对 Codex 代理软件开发未来的看法
items.summary_zh: Sea Limited 的 CPO 解释了该公司为何在工程团队中部署 Codex 以加速亚洲 AI 原生软件的开发。

items.title: A DeFi exchange becomes the first to offer equity perpetuals powered by Nasdaq data
items.summary: The partnership underscores both the rapid growth of equity perpetuals in onchain markets and Nasdaq’s broader strategy to support tokenized equity trading infrastructure.
items.title_zh: DeFi 交易所成为首个提供由纳斯达克数据支持的股票永续合约的交易所
items.summary_zh: 此次合作凸显了链上永续股票市场的快速增长，以及纳斯达克支持代币化股票交易基础设施的更广泛战略。

items.title: Bitcoin has shed $5,000 within days. ETF flows, derivatives say the selloff could worsen
items.summary: Bitcoin has fallen about 6% from $82,000 to $76,800, and underlying data point to the drop being more than a routine pullback.
items.title_zh: 比特币几天之内就下跌了 5,000 美元。 ETF 流量和衍生品称抛售可能会恶化
items.summary_zh: 比特币已从 82,000 美元下跌约 6% 至 76,800 美元，基础数据表明跌幅不仅仅是常规回调。

items.title: How business operations teams use Codex
items.summary: See how business operations teams can use Codex to create initiative briefs, strategy updates, leadership decision packets, progress updates, and more from real work inputs.
items.title_zh: 业务运营团队如何使用 Codex
items.summary_zh: 了解业务运营团队如何使用 Codex 根据实际工作输入创建计划简报、战略更新、领导决策包、进度更新等。

items.title: Helping ChatGPT better recognize context in sensitive conversations
items.summary: Learn how new ChatGPT safety updates improve context awareness in sensitive conversations, helping detect risk over time and respond more safely.
items.title_zh: 帮助 ChatGPT 更好地识别敏感对话中的上下文
items.summary_zh: 了解新的 ChatGPT 安全更新如何提高敏感对话中的上下文感知，帮助随着时间的推移检测风险并更安全地做出响应。

items.title: Standard Chartered to cut over 15% of corporate functions roles as it targets higher returns
items.summary: Standard Chartered will trim corporate functions roles and target a more than 20% increase in income per employee by 2028 as it seeks stronger returns.
items.title_zh: 渣打银行将削减超过 15% 的企业职能职位，以实现更高回报
items.summary_zh: 渣打银行将削减企业职能，并计划到 2028 年将每位员工的收入增加 20% 以上，以寻求更强劲的回报。

items.title: Nvidia earnings call drama: Will Jensen Huang talk 'Trump' and China chips after Xi summit?
items.summary: Both Nvidia's earnings and its commentary on its financial report are expected to be big tests for U.S. equities.
items.title_zh: 英伟达财报电话大戏：习近平峰会后黄仁勋会谈论“特朗普”和中国芯片吗？
items.summary_zh: 英伟达的盈利及其对财务报告的评论预计将成为美国股市的重大考验。

items.title: One of the market's hottest stock themes is buying everything AI can't replace
items.summary: The search for HALO stocks is a hot theme in the stock market. There is now an ETF to invest in it.
items.title_zh: 市场最热门的股票主题之一是购买人工智能无法取代的一切
items.summary_zh: 寻找HALO股票是股市的热门话题。现在有一个ETF可以投资它。

items.title: Ebola may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
items.summary: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.
items.title_zh: 世界卫生组织医生警告说，埃博拉病毒的传播速度可能比最初想象的要快
items.summary_zh: 中部非洲疑似有数百起病例，但专家担心实际数字可能要高得多。

items.title: Blocked Strait of Hormuz Leads to New Opportunities for Syria
items.summary: The latest war in the Middle East has created new economic opportunities for Syria thanks to its geography.
items.title_zh: 霍尔木兹海峡被封锁为叙利亚带来新机遇
items.summary_zh: 由于其地理位置，最近的中东战争为叙利亚创造了新的经济机会。

items.title: He Shut Liquor Stores and Banned Abortion, All for the Glory of Russia
items.summary: A firebrand governor aims to transform his region into a laboratory for the Kremlin’s reactionary ideals.
items.title_zh: 他关闭酒类商店并禁止堕胎，一切都是为了俄罗斯的荣耀
items.summary_zh: 一位煽动性的州长旨在将他的地区变成克里姆林宫反动理想的实验室。

items.title: XRP and Solana funds attract inflows as bitcoin outflows hit nearly $1 billion
items.summary: CoinShares data shows investors are rotating into listed products based on XRP and SOL while bitcoin and ethereum products posted heavy weekly outflows.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币流出量接近 10 亿美元，XRP 和 Solana 基金吸引资金流入
items.summary_zh: CoinShares 数据显示，投资者正在转向基于 XRP 和 SOL 的上市产品，而比特币和以太坊产品则每周出现大量资金流出。

items.title: World Liberty Financial treasury company AI Financial warns that it may not survive the year in SEC filing
items.summary: The former Alt5 Sigma marked its 7.28 billion WLFI tokens at $706 million, down from a roughly $1.46 billion cost basis, while disclosing that the holdings remain locked amid liquidity concerns.
items.title_zh: World Liberty Financial 财资公司 AI Financial 在 SEC 备案文件中警告称，该公司可能无法度过今年
items.summary_zh: 前 Alt5 Sigma 将其 72.8 亿个 WLFI 代币标记为 7.06 亿美元，低于约 14.6 亿美元的成本基础，同时透露，由于流动性担忧，其持有量仍处于锁定状态。

items.title: Minnesotan banks and credit unions set to provide crypto custody Aug. 1
items.summary: Minnesota established the midwest’s first unified digital asset safety net for banks and credit unions.
items.title_zh: 明尼苏达州银行和信用合作社将于 8 月 1 日提供加密货币托管服务
items.summary_zh: 明尼苏达州为银行和信用合作社建立了中西部第一个统一的数字资产安全网。

items.title: Solana is shedding its memecoin reputation as big banks move billions into its ecosystem
items.summary: Wall Street and payment giants are quietly taking over Solana, moving billions onto the network for tokenized funds and global payments even as the broader crypto market cools down, according to a new report by Messari.
items.title_zh: 随着大银行将数十亿美元投入其生态系统，Solana 正在失去其 memecoin 的声誉
items.summary_zh: 根据 Messari 的一份新报告，华尔街和支付巨头正在悄然接管 Solana，将数十亿美元转移到网络上进行代币化基金和全球支付，尽管更广泛的加密货币市场正在降温。

items.title: Minnesota signs law allowing banks, credit unions to offer crypto custody services
items.summary: Governor Tim Walz has signed HF 3709 into law, permitting banks and credit unions to offer crypto custody services.
items.title_zh: 明尼苏达州签署法律允许银行、信用合作社提供加密货币托管服务
items.summary_zh: 州长 Tim Walz 已将 HF 3709 签署为法律，允许银行和信用合作社提供加密货币托管服务。

items.title: SEC’s innovation exemption for tokenized stocks to come as early as this week: Bloomberg
items.summary: The SEC has approved several entities to move forward with tokenized stock initiatives, including the NYSE and Nasdaq.

items.summary: Google’s sharing 20 fun facts to celebrate Google Translate turning 20, from its roots as a 2006 AI experiment to supporting almost 250 languages today.

items.title: Games people — and machines — play: Untangling strategic reasoning to advance AI
items.summary: Assistant Professor Gabriele Farina mines the foundations of decision-making in complex multi-agent scenarios.

items.summary: Building on a long-standing MIT–IBM collaboration, the new lab will chart the convergence of AI, algorithms, and quantum computing.

items.title: Echo Protocol suffers $76 million exploit in eBTC minting attack on Monad
items.summary: The Bitcoin-focused DeFi protocol suffered an attack whereby about 1,000 unauthorized eBTC $77 million were minted on the Monad blockchain
items.title_zh: Echo 协议在 Monad 的 eBTC 铸币攻击中遭受 7600 万美元的攻击
items.summary_zh: 以比特币为中心的 DeFi 协议遭受攻击，Monad 区块链上铸造了约 1,000 个未经授权的 eBTC，价值 7700 万美元

items.title: Revolut wants to take Dogecoin mainstream with its new physical payment card
items.summary: The European fintech giant is launching a physical debit card that lets users spend the popular meme coin anywhere Visa and Mastercard are accepted with zero extra exchange fees.

items.title: Beacon Biosignals is mapping the brain during sleep
items.summary: Founded by Jake Donoghue PhD ’19 and former MIT researcher Jarrett Revels, the company is creating an AI-driven platform to help diagnose and treat disease.
items.title_zh: Beacon Biosignals 正在绘制睡眠期间的大脑图

items.title_zh: 为好奇心驱动的科学提供理由

items.title: Berkshire Hathaway has revamped its portfolio — Here's how the new stocks are trading
items.summary: Berkshire Hathaway took a $2.6 billion stake in Delta Airlines and increased its shares in Alphabet by 224%.
items.title_zh: 伯克希尔哈撒韦公司调整了其投资组合——以下是新股票的交易方式

items.title: White House touts deals on soybeans and rare earths after Trump-Xi summit, while China talks up tariff cuts
items.summary: The meeting between U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping last week yielded new pacts, though the sides have provided differing details.

items.title: AI-related layoffs a boost for stocks? Not necessarily

items.title: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
items.summary: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.

items.title: Teen suspects fatally shoot three in suspected hate crime at San Diego mosque
items.summary: The alleged attackers were aged 17 and 18 and one left a note containing "generalised hate rhetoric", investigators say.

items.summary_zh: 调查人员称，被指控的袭击者年龄分别为 17 岁和 18 岁，其中一人留下了一张包含“普遍仇恨言论”的字条。

items.title: Trump says he called off new Iran attack at request of Gulf states
items.summary: The US president says he is holding off on an attack planned for Tuesday as "serious negotiations are now taking place".

items.summary_zh: 美国总统表示，他将推迟计划于周二发动的袭击，因为“目前正在进行认真的谈判”。

items.title: Selling children to survive: Afghan fathers forced to make impossible choices
items.summary: In Afghanistan today, a staggering three in four people cannot meet their basic needs.

items.summary_zh: 如今，在阿富汗，有四分之三的人无法满足他们的基本需求。

items.title: Two dead in Spain shooting, with babies reportedly among injured
items.summary: Police say a 25-year-old man is suspected of killing his parents and injuring four others in southern Spain.
items.title_zh: 西班牙枪击事件造成两人死亡，据报道婴儿受伤
items.summary_zh: 警方称，一名 25 岁男子涉嫌在西班牙南部杀害了他的父母并打伤了另外四人。

items.title: Two bodies of missing Italians recovered from inside Maldives cave
items.summary: The two were among four divers located in the furthest chamber in the cave and their bodies were recovered by specialist divers.
items.title_zh: 马尔代夫洞穴内发现两具失踪意大利人尸体
items.summary_zh: 这两人是位于洞穴最远房间的四名潜水员之一，他们的尸体被专业潜水员发现。

items.title: What really holds China and Russia together
items.summary: The relationship endures despite a power imbalance, with both sides recognising that it is too important to fail.
items.title_zh: 是什么真正将中国和俄罗斯联系在一起
items.summary_zh: 尽管权力不平衡，这种关系仍然持续存在，双方都认识到这种关系太重要了，不能失败。

items.title: Jackson Pollock painting sells for record $181m at auction
items.summary: The Abstract Expressionist's Number 7A, 1948 painting is now his most expensive artwork ever sold at auction.
items.title_zh: 杰克逊·波洛克 (Jackson Pollock) 画作在拍卖会上以创纪录的 1.81 亿美元成交
items.summary_zh: 这位抽象表现主义画家 1948 年的 7A 号画作现在是他在拍卖会上售出的最昂贵的艺术品。

items.title: Tasmanian government apologises over stolen body parts scandal
items.summary: An investigation found that 177 human specimens from dozens of bodies were secretly kept by a museum.
items.title_zh: 塔斯马尼亚政府就被盗尸体丑闻道歉
items.summary_zh: 调查发现，某博物馆秘密保存了数十具尸体的177具人体标本。

items.title: Starbucks Korea sacks CEO over controversial 'Tank Day' promotion
items.summary: Starbucks withdrew the campaign for its drink tumblers after many said it referenced a bloody crackdown.

items.summary_zh: 在许多人表示星巴克涉及血腥镇压后，星巴克撤回了其饮料杯的宣传活动。

items.title: As Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Sites, an Environmental Disaster Unfolds
items.summary: After invading more than four years ago, Moscow has usually been the one causing ecological disaster. But Kyiv’s strikes, intended to cut into the Kremlin’s oil revenue, have flipped the script.
items.title_zh: 乌克兰袭击俄罗斯石油基地，一场环境灾难上演
items.summary_zh: 在四年多前入侵之后，莫斯科通常是造成生态灾难的一方。但基辅旨在削减克里姆林宫石油收入的罢工却扭转了局面。

items.title: Here’s How Iran Could Respond to Renewed U.S.-Israeli Strikes
items.summary: In any new round of fighting, Iranian officials could adopt new tactics, including intensified strikes on neighbors and trying to close off a second strait.
items.title_zh: 伊朗如何应对美国和以色列的新一轮袭击
items.summary_zh: 在任何新一轮的战斗中，伊朗官员都可能采取新的策略，包括加强对邻国的打击，并试图封锁第二条海峡。

items.title: Trump’s Portrait Pops Up on Rickshaws in India to Mark America’s 250th
items.summary: The president is popping up on the back of the iconic three-wheeler to kick off America’s 250th anniversary celebrations in India.

items.summary_zh: 总统突然出现在标志性三轮车的后面，为在印度举行的美国 250 周年庆祝活动拉开序幕。

items.title: Oil Slick Reaches a Pristine Persian Gulf Island in Iran
items.summary: Videos show birds, turtles and crabs trapped inside mounds of tar around Shidvar island, a protected wildlife sanctuary with turquoise waters and white sand beaches.
items.title_zh: 浮油到达伊朗的一个原始波斯湾岛屿
items.summary_zh: 视频显示，鸟类、海龟和螃蟹被困在希德瓦尔岛周围的焦油堆中，希德瓦尔岛是一个受保护的野生动物保护区，拥有碧绿的海水和白色的沙滩。

items.title: In Closed-Door Talks, U.S. Demands a Major Role in Greenland
items.summary: Greenlandic officials worry about the direction of the negotiations aimed at defusing President Trump’s threats to seize their island. But they have little leverage.

items.summary_zh: 格陵兰官员担心旨在化解特朗普总统夺取格陵兰岛威胁的谈判方向。但他们的影响力微乎其微。

items.title: Trump’s Taiwan Gambit is Already a Gift to China
items.summary: President Trump’s open willingness to hold up a $14 billion Taiwan arms package is a win for Beijing. Now China could be weighing how to keep the weapons on ice for as long as it can.
items.title_zh: 特朗普的台湾策略已经是送给中国的礼物
items.summary_zh: 特朗普总统公开愿意推迟价值 140 亿美元的台湾武器计划，这对北京来说是一场胜利。现在，中国可能正在考虑如何尽可能长时间地保存这些武器。

items.title: Ebola Was Identified in Congo Weeks Before W.H.O. Declared an Emergency
items.summary: Early surveillance and testing failed to identify the rare species of Ebola responsible for the current outbreak. An American doctor is among the confirmed cases.

items.summary_zh: 早期监测和测试未能确定导致当前疫情爆发的埃博拉稀有物种。确诊病例中有一名美国医生。
